title: Fluffy Argentinian New Potatoes Gratin
description: A hearty Argentinian dish featuring new potatoes in a rich and creamy gratin, perfect for a cozy dinner
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit
In a large saucepan, combine the sliced new potatoes and enough cold water to cover them, then bring to a boil over high heat
Reduce the heat to medium-low and simmer the potatoes for 5 minutes, or until they are slightly tender
Drain the potatoes and set them aside
In a large skillet, heat the unsalted butter and olive oil over medium heat
Add the thinly sliced onion to the skillet and cook, stirring occasionally, until it is softened and lightly browned
Add the minced garlic to the skillet and cook, stirring constantly, for 1 minute
In a greased 9x13 inch baking dish, create a layer of the cooked potatoes
Spread half of the cooked onion and garlic mixture over the potatoes, then sprinkle with half of the shredded gruyere cheese
Repeat the layers, starting with the potatoes, then the remaining onion and garlic mixture, and finally the remaining gruyere cheese
In a small bowl, whisk together the heavy cream, dried thyme, salt, and black pepper, then pour the mixture over the top layer of cheese
